sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61383" key="kwrali/skos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κωρᾰλίσκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κὼρος </foreign>(<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">= κοῦρος</foreign> A), Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:2:926" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.926</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl>; title of play by Epilycus.</entryFree>
